subject: Quick checkout insight for prose.com
short_message: Your checkout scored 60 and may be losing about $7500/month due to shipping cost surprise.
full_message:
Hey — quick heads up.

I ran your Shopify checkout through a benchmark tool I built.

Your checkout scored 60 and appears to be losing about $7500/month due to shipping cost surprise.

You can review the benchmark here:
https://abando-checkout-grader.vercel.app/checkout_grader.html?store=prose.com

If useful, Abando can help fix this automatically:
https://abando-checkout-grader.vercel.app/install.html

Happy to share the full analysis.
